action_set_definitions.name: get_intake_strategy_notes
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the text feedback and notes from the recent Intake Strategy Session regarding Calibration Profiles (CPs).

example_output.notes: Discussion on CPs: Need Python/AWS expertise. Max salary capped at 150k. Avoid previous runners-up.

action_set_definitions.name: search_candidates
action_set_definitions.description: Filters the candidate database based on specific technical skills and a compensation ceiling.

action_set_definitions.name: get_candidate_metadata
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves detailed metadata for a specific candidate, including their history and record status.

candidate_id.description: The unique identifier for the candidate.

action_set_definitions.name: update_candidate_status
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the recruitment status of a specific candidate in the screening history.

candidate_id.description: The unique identifier for the candidate.

new_status.description: The new status to assign to the candidate.

state_description.candidate_database: The complete list of candidate objects, each containing metadata, resume text, and unique IDs.
state_description.active_filters: Current criteria applied to the candidate pool, such as minimum experience or required keywords.
state_description.current_view_pointer: The index or ID representing the current candidate being examined in the interface.
state_description.screening_history: A mapping of candidate IDs to their current status: 'pending', 'shortlisted', or 'rejected'.

metadata.hm_feedback: REJECTED: While this profile has strong Java skills, we are pivoting. For this specific requisition, Go (Golang) is now a non-negotiable Must-Have. Do not advance anyone without Go.

candidate_database.resume_text: Calibration Sample 1: Java/Spring Expert. 10 years experience.

metadata.hm_feedback: HOLD: This profile is a 'Bullseye' technically, but the $185k expectation is $25k over our absolute hard cap for this role. We must keep all candidates at or below $160k.

candidate_database.resume_text: Senior Developer. Skills: Golang, Docker, Kubernetes. $145k.
Senior Developer. Skills: Golang, Docker, Kubernetes. $145k.
Backend Engineer. Expert in Golang and SQL. $155k.
